name: studio.restore_snapshot
description: Restore an Actium Studio site to a previously-captured snapshot. Opt-in gated per work-r1-actium-studio-skills.md §1.1 — requires explicit operator confirm:true.
whenToUse: Operator explicitly approved rolling back a site after a bad publish or content regression.
Disaster-recovery flow: restore the last known-good snapshot after corruption or accidental deletion.
A scripted safe-deploy flow captured a pre-op snapshot and now needs to restore on verification failure, with confirm:true asserted by the caller.
whenNotToUse: No explicit confirm:true from the operator — this skill is destructive and must not fire implicitly.
Caller wants to inspect a snapshot's contents before restoring — use studio.list_snapshots plus studio.diff_versions first.
Caller wants to revert a single page — restore_snapshot is site-wide; use studio.update_page with the previous content to revert one page only.
